response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ year experience bar with roughly 15 years of full-stack work, including recent, directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js/React product experience and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic tooling), which is the rarest requirement in this posting. His testing pedigree is exceptional — TDD practice, authored test frameworks and a test runner — and he covers databases, Docker/Kubernetes, and AWS. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Kotlin experience and a frontend history weighted toward Ember.js over React, all learnable given his demonstrated polyglot range.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS work at product companies
Current AI-agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Deep testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and authored testing libraries
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, which is the primary backend framework for this role
No Kotlin exposure and Java experience is dated, limiting coverage of the secondary stack
Frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js; React depth appears limited to one recent role, and Vitest/Playwright are not explicitly listed
